page_metadata.biotools__summary: A webserver for quantitative analysis of GPCR structures and comparison of residue-residue contact scores (RRCS) between two structures, activation pathway analysis, ligand-receptor interaction analysis and RRCS analysis between transmembrane helices.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A webserver for quantitative analysis of GPCR structures and comparison of residue-residue contact scores (RRCS) between two structures, activation pathway analysis, ligand-receptor interaction analysis and RRCS analysis between transmembrane helices.
